data.title: What's Going On With Canoo Shares Friday
data.description: Canoo is expected to report 2024 fiscal year second quarter earnings on Wednesday after the market closes.

data.title: What's Going On With Intel Stock?
data.description: Intel shares are trading lower by 3.1% during Friday session. The stock has been volatile since last week's disappointing Q2 earnings report.

data.title: This Cannabis Co With Significant Growth Potential And Other Hot Weed Stocks Soon To Report Earnings, What Investors Need To Know Now
data.description: Vext Science, Inc. (CSE: VEXT) (OTCQX: VEXTF), a cannabis operator with vertical operations in Arizona and Ohio, said it will release its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2024, before the market opens on Tuesday, Aug. 20, 2024. A conference call and webcast will take place on the same day at 08:00 am Eastern Time. Auxly Cannabis Group Inc. (TSX: XLY) (OTCQB: CBWTF) will report earnings results for its second quarter ended June 30, 2024, on Thursday, Aug. 15, 2024, before the financial markets open.Cannabinoids-focused MediPharm Labs Corp. (TSX: LABS) (OTCQB: MEDIF) (FSE: MLZ) will release its second quarter financial results for the period ended June 30, 2024, before markets open on Wednesday, Aug. 14, 2024. A conference call and audio webcast will take place the same day at 8:30 am Eastern Time.

data.title: A Trade That Worked In This Market
Algonquin Shares Plunge: Posts Mixed Q2, Sells Renewables Energy Business & Cuts Dividend
data.description: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. reports Q2 results and $2.5B sale of renewable energy business, cutting dividend to focus on regulated utilities.
